invalidAmount: Invalid amount. Please check the payment total.
productNotFound: One or more products could not be found. They may have been removed from the catalog. Please remove them from your order.
invoiceCreationFailed: Invoice could not be created. Fix the error and try again.
paymentRecordingFailed: Payment could not be recorded. Fix the error and try again.
paymentNotRecordedCompleteOnOrder: Order created but payment could not be recorded. You can complete payment on the order page.
b2bCreditHold: This customer is on credit hold. New credit orders are blocked.
b2bCreditExceeded: This order exceeds the customer's available credit. Reduce the amount or collect payment now.
splitAmountMismatch: The payment amounts must add up to the order total.
deferredLegNotAlone: A pay-later method cannot be combined with other payment methods.
paymentReferenceRequired: A payment reference is required for this method.
paymentTerminalRequired: Select a payment terminal for this method.
outstandingPolicyRequired: Choose how the remaining balance should be handled.
